description: Address semantic review issues: infinite scroll filter inconsistency, RecentlyPlayedTracker data integrity, autocomplete race condition, artwork download cross-origin, theme flash, localStorage quota warning, and Last.fm API key documentation.
steps: Fix InfiniteScroll.tsx to apply genre/year/explicit filters to paginated results by passing filter params and applying client-side filtering
Fix RecentlyPlayedTracker to store complete track metadata by extending AudioPlayerContext TrackMetadata to include full ItunesTrack data
Add AbortController to SearchBar.tsx autocomplete to cancel stale requests
Fix ShareMenu.tsx artwork download to use fetch+blob approach for cross-origin images
Add blocking inline script to layout.tsx to prevent theme flash on light-mode preference
Add console.warn for localStorage quota exceeded in personalization.ts
Note: PersonalizationContext shared subscription (#6) is acceptable for now
acceptance_criteria: Infinite scroll respects genre, year, and explicit filters on subsequent pages
RecentlyPlayedTracker stores full track data including primaryGenreName, artistId, collectionName
Autocomplete cancels stale requests using AbortController
Artwork download uses fetch+blob to actually download cross-origin images
No theme flash for light-mode users (blocking script sets correct class before paint)
localStorage quota errors produce a console warning
bun run build passes without errors
